2605.09862.title: UFO: A Unified Flow-Oriented Framework for Robust Continual Graph Learning
2605.09862.paper_summary: Graph learning research has increasingly shifted toward continual graph learning (CGL), which better reflects real-world scenarios where graphs evolve over time. However, existing CGL methods largely assume clean supervision and overlook a critical challenge: the newly arriving portions of the graph are often noisy, due to annotation errors or adversarial corruption. This mismatch limits their applicability in practice. In this work, we study robust continual graph learning, where models must simultaneously handle catastrophic forgetting and noisy supervision in evolving graph data. We show that label noise introduces a new failure mode, catastrophic remembering, where models persistently reinforce corrupted knowledge across tasks. To address these challenges, we propose a Unified Flow-Oriented framework (UFO). First, UFO models conditional feature distributions via flow-based generative modeling and produces replay representations, mitigating forgetting without storing historical data. Second, UFO estimates instance-level reliability scores to distinguish clean from noisy nodes, reducing the impact of corrupted supervision and alleviating catastrophic remembering. Extensive experiments on four benchmark graph datasets under varying noise ratios demonstrate that UFO consistently outperforms existing methods in both accuracy and forgetting metrics. Code is available at: https://anonymous.4open.science/r/UFO.
2605.09862.paper_summary_zh: 圖形學習研究越來越多地轉向持續圖形學習（CGL），這更好地反映了圖形隨時間演變的現實場景。<lb/>然而，現有的CGL方法在很大程度上假設有乾淨的監督，並忽略了一個關鍵挑戰：新到的圖形部分通常是嘈雜的，這是由於標註錯誤或對抗性破壞。<lb/>這種不匹配限制了它們在實際中的應用。<lb/>在這項工作中，我們研究了穩健的持續圖形學習，其中模型必須同時處理災難性遺忘和演變圖形數據中的嘈雜監督。<lb/>我們表明，標籤噪聲引入了一種新的失敗模式，即災難性記憶，在這種模式下，模型在不同任務中持續強化損壞的知識。<lb/>為了解決這些挑戰，我們提出了一個統一的流向框架（UFO）。<lb/>首先，UFO通過基於流的生成建模來建模條件特徵分佈，並生成重放表示，減輕遺忘而不需要存儲歷史數據。<lb/>其次，UFO估計實例級可靠性分數，以區分乾淨和嘈雜的節點，減少損壞監督的影響並緩解災難性記憶。<lb/>在四個基準圖形數據集上進行的廣泛實驗，在不同的噪聲比下顯示，UFO在準確性和遺忘指標上始終優於現有方法。<lb/>代碼可在以下網址獲得：https://anonymous.4open.science/r/UFO。
2605.09862.author: Danhui Zhang et.al.
2605.09862.authors: Danhui Zhang, Zhe Wang, Qing Qing, Jiarui Liu, Wentao Gao, Ziqi Xu, Mingliang Hou, Xikun Zhang, Renqiang Luo
